arguments.name: gain
arguments.polarity: 0 = silent; 1 = nominal per-band gain; values above 1 add gain up to 3.

capabilities.name: band_gain
capabilities.smoothing: Exponential-style lag in the SynthDef via lag(0.05).

arguments.name: azimuth_degrees
arguments.polarity: Negative and positive values rotate in opposite directions around the horizontal plane; 0 is front.

capabilities.name: band_azimuth
capabilities.smoothing: Exponential-style lag in the SynthDef via lag(0.05); values are converted from degrees to radians for FoaPanB.

arguments.name: distance
arguments.polarity: Increasing values attenuate the wet contribution by 1/distance; DSP clamps the divisor to 0.1.

arguments.name: solo
arguments.polarity: 0 = not soloed; 1 = soloed. If any band is soloed, only soloed bands pass.

arguments.name: reciprocal_q
arguments.polarity: This is SuperCollider BPF rq (bandwidth divided by center frequency), despite the legacy q address name; larger values produce a wider band.

capabilities.name: band_filter_rq
capabilities.smoothing: Exponential-style lag in the SynthDef via lag(0.05).

arguments.name: master_gain
arguments.polarity: 0 = silent; 1 = unity final gain; values above 1 add gain up to 3.

arguments.meaning: On write, an absolute local path to a readable, non-empty mono or stereo WAV. On state read, the active standardized path, or an empty string when no nature buffer is active. Invalid paths are rejected without replacing the active layer.
arguments.name: path

capabilities.name: nature_load
capabilities.smoothing: No value smoothing; a valid replacement becomes active only after its stereo playback buffer is ready.

arguments.name: gain
arguments.polarity: Bounded linear amplitude: 0 = silent and 1 = unity. The receiver and SynthDef both clamp to this range.

capabilities.name: nature_gain
capabilities.smoothing: Exponential-style gain lag in the sample-player SynthDef via lag(0.05).

instruments.description: Thirteen-band binaural spatializer for a live Harmonic Beacon analog signal, plus a native looping nature-WAV layer summed onto the stereo output.

arguments.name: gain
arguments.polarity: 0 = silent; 1 = maximum per-voice gain. Clamped in VoiceParameterStore.set_gain.

capabilities.name: harmonic_gain
capabilities.smoothing: Immediate store write; audio envelope (attack_s / release_s) applies only to voice on/off amplitude, not to this gain set.

arguments.name: pan
arguments.polarity: -1 = left; 0 = center; 1 = right. Clamped in VoiceParameterStore.set_pan.

arguments.name: phase_degrees
arguments.polarity: OSC argument is degrees. Store converts with math.radians(phase_deg % 360). Increasing values advance phase; 360 wraps to 0.

capabilities.name: harmonic_phase
capabilities.smoothing: Immediate store write; no circular interpolation on the OSC path today.

arguments.name: gain
arguments.polarity: 0 = silent master; 1 = full Shaper master gain. Clamped in set_master_gain. Default DEFAULT_SHAPER_MASTER = 0.8.

arguments.name: trigger
arguments.polarity: Message presence triggers panic; argument values are ignored by the handler.

capabilities.name: panic
capabilities.smoothing: Immediate: deactivates all voices, resets gain/pan/phase defaults, clears active history; may invoke MIDI panic callback.

instruments.description: Additive harmonic synthesizer (Shaper): up to 32 sine voices keyed by harmonic_n 1..32, waveshaper drive, per-voice LFO, beacon sidechain, master gain. Currently embedded in digital-beacon; this manifest formalizes the OSC surface already exposed by digital_beacon/osc_receiver.py.

scenes.description: Focused HarMoCAP subject drives five Shaper harmonics, the non-focused person drives Beacon master gain, and ECG beat edges pulse the bounded nature layer.
scenes.name: Event Demo

scenes.description: A deliberately small hot-swap scene retaining head, crowd, and heartbeat motion.
scenes.name: Sparse Interlude
